backlog_cursor.description: Run 9 on 2026-02-22. Created Mermaid docs PR and llms.txt feature PR. PR #977 merged by dsyme.

970.description: Provided API migration guidance for Literate.FormatLiterateNodes to WriteHtml/ToHtml

961.description: Explained that docfx [!code-fsharp[...]] syntax is not supported by fsdocs; suggested pre-processing or feature request

931.description: Linked to draft PR #975 for Ctrl+C fix

918.description: Identified IsLibrary filter in ProjectCracker.fs and outlined fix steps

930.description: Identified root causes for infinite watch loop (duplicate watchers, missing output exclusion); debugging steps suggested

944.description: Suggested URL collision between same-named namespace and type as likely cause; pointed to readCommentsInto and ResolveUrlBaseNameForEntity

952.description: Pointed to new draft PR adding Mermaid docs recipe

951.description: Pointed to new draft PR implementing --generatellmstxt flag

931.description: Changed waitForKey to use Console.CancelKeyPress + ManualResetEventSlim instead of Console.ReadKey(). Build succeeded.
931.pr_title: [Repo Assist] Use Ctrl+C to stop watch mode instead of any key press

mermaid-docs.description: Added docs/sidebyside/sidemermaid.md with Mermaid JS recipe (script tag in _head.html). Addresses #952.

llms-txt.description: Added --generatellmstxt flag to CoreBuildOptions. Generates llms.txt and llms-full.txt in output root. Build+tests pass. Addresses #951.

21.0.1.description: RELEASE_NOTES.md updated to promote [Unreleased] FCS 43.10.100 to 21.0.1. Draft PR created.

2026-02-22.description: Updated G-Research.FSharp.Analyzers 0.18.0 -> 0.21.0, Ionide.Analyzers 0.14.7 -> 0.14.11. Build succeeded. Draft PR created.

925.author: tymokvo
925.reason: CHANGES_REQUESTED from nojaf since Jul 2024, stale

notes: PR #977 (dep updates) was merged by dsyme on 2026-02-22.
Open Repo Assist PRs: #975 (Ctrl+C watch fix, CI passed), #976 (Release 21.0.1, CI passed), plus new PRs for Mermaid docs and llms.txt (pending creation).
Other open PRs: #978 (Copilot: exe projects, CI action_required), #965 (emoji fix, ready), #925 (watch mode fix, CHANGES_REQUESTED), #875 (fsdocs init, stale), #776 (node_modules).
System.Drawing.Common 4.7.0 critical vulnerability (GHSA-rxg9-xrhp-64gj) comes from Suave 2.6.2. Suave major update needed to fix.
Larger dep updates deferred: Suave 2->3, Ionide.ProjInfo 0.62->0.74, System.Text.Json 8->10, NUnit 3->4, FsUnit 5->7, NUnit3TestAdapter 4->6.
llms.txt feature: added --generatellmstxt flag, generates llms.txt and llms-full.txt in output root. Uses existing search index data. Build+tests pass.
Mermaid recipe: added docs/sidebyside/sidemermaid.md showing _head.html CDN script approach.
Tasks to prioritize next run: task1 (triage new issues), task6 (check stale PRs), task9 (new contributors)
